mapper.select: SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_nm, a.track_id, a.track_nm, a.album_id, f.artist_id repArtistId, f.artist_nm repArtistNm, a.track_sn, a.track_bf_sn, a.agency_id, if(a.streaming_premium_yn = 'Y' OR a.pps_yn = 'Y', 'Y', 'N') holdbackYn, a.create_dtime, a.update_dtime, d.artist_id, d.artist_nm, b.album_img_size size, CONCAT(b.album_img_url, '?updateDate=', unix_timestamp(b.update_dtime)) url, a.trackCreateDtime, a.trackUpdateDtime FROM ( SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_nm, c.track_id , c.track_nm, c.album_id, c.reprsnt_artist_id, b.track_sn, b.track_bf_sn, c.agency_id, c.streaming_premium_yn, c.pps_yn, a.create_dtime, a.update_dtime, c.create_dtime trackCreateDtime, c.update_dtime trackUpdateDtime FROM tb_chnl a INNER JOIN tb_map_chnl_track b ON a.chnl_id = b.chnl_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id WHERE a.rank_chnl_type = '1HOUR' AND a.disp_status_type ='Y' AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY b.track_sn LIMIT 0 , 12 ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_album_img b ON a.album_id = b.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_trackartist as c ON a.track_id = c.track_id AND c.rp_yn = 'Y' and c.db_sts = 'A' LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist d ON c.artist_id = d.artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_album e ON a.album_id = e.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist f ON a.reprsnt_artist_id = f.artist_id

SELECT b.chart_id, b.chart_nm, d.track_id, f.album_id, g.album_img_url as url, g.album_img_size as size FROM tb_svc_genre a JOIN tb_chart b ON a.svc_genre_id = b.svc_content_id JOIN tb_chart_music_content c ON b.chart_id = c.chart_id JOIN tb_track d ON c.music_content_id = d.track_id JOIN ted_track e ON d.track_id = e.track_id JOIN ted_album f ON e.album_id = f.album_id JOIN tb_album_img g ON f.album_id = g.album_id WHERE a.main_disp_std_yn = 'Y' AND b.chart_type_cd IN ('DAILY', 'NEW') AND b.svc_content_type = 'GENRE' AND b.music_content_type = 'TRACK' AND c.disp_sn = 1 ORDER BY a.main_disp_sn LIMIT 12

SELECT bb.chart_id, bb.chart_nm, dd.track_id, ff.album_id, gg.album_img_url as url, gg.album_img_size as size FROM ( SELECT /* 1. 선호 장르에 매핑된 서비스 장르가 1개: 장르 기준 제공 */ 10 ord, b.update_dtime, d.svc_genre_id FROM TB_CHARACTER a JOIN tb_character_prefer_genre b ON a.character_no = b.character_no JOIN TB_PREFER_GENRE C ON B.PREFER_GENRE_ID = C.PREFER_GENRE_ID JOIN (SELECT prefer_genre_id, svc_genre_id, disp_sn, count(*) AS svc_genre_cnt FROM tb_map_prefer_genre_svc_genre GROUP BY prefer_genre_id ) d ON c.prefer_genre_id = d.prefer_genre_id WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND d.svc_genre_cnt = 1 UNION SELECT /* 2-1. 선호 장르에 매핑된 서비스 장르가 N개 이고 아티스트 미선택: 서비스 장르의 3뎁스 동일명 디폴트 설정:사용 장르 기준 제공 */ 21 ord, b.update_dtime, f.svc_genre_id FROM tb_character a JOIN tb_character_prefer_genre b ON a.character_no = b.character_no JOIN tb_prefer_genre c ON b.prefer_genre_id = c.prefer_genre_id JOIN (SELECT prefer_genre_id, svc_genre_id, disp_sn, count(*) AS svc_genre_cnt FROM tb_map_prefer_genre_svc_genre GROUP BY prefer_genre_id ) d ON c.prefer_genre_id = d.prefer_genre_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT prefer_genre_id, count(*) AS prefer_genre_cnt FROM tb_prefer_genre_artist GROUP BY prefer_genre_id ) e ON c.prefer_genre_id = e.prefer_genre_cnt JOIN tb_svc_genre f ON d.svc_genre_id = f.svc_genre_id WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND d.svc_genre_cnt > 1 AND f.browser_disp_std_yn = 'Y' #3뎁스 동일명 디폴트 설정:사용 으로 변경 AND e.prefer_genre_id IS NULL UNION SELECT /* 2-2. 선호 장르에 매핑된 서비스 장르가 N개 이고 아티스트 선택: 선호 아티스트 국가와 장르의 최상위 장르(1레벨) 구분으로 매핑된 장르 기준 제공 */ 22 ord, c.update_dtime, e.svc_genre_id FROM tb_character a JOIN tb_character_prefer_genre b ON a.character_no = b.character_no JOIN tb_prefer_genre_artist C ON b.prefer_genre_id = c.prefer_genre_id JOIN (SELECT prefer_genre_id, svc_genre_id, disp_sn, count(*) AS svc_genre_cnt FROM tb_map_prefer_genre_svc_genre GROUP BY prefer_genre_id ) d ON c.prefer_genre_id = d.prefer_genre_id JOIN ( SELECT x.svc_genre_id, x.parents_svc_genre_id, x.svc_genre_nm, x.level, CASE ( CASE level WHEN 1 THEN svc_genre_id WHEN 2 THEN parents_svc_genre_id WHEN 3 THEN (SELECT parents_svc_genre_id FROM tb_svc_genre WHERE svc_genre_id = x.parents_svc_genre_id) END ) WHEN 1 THEN 'KOR' WHEN 2 THEN 'KOR' ELSE 'FOR' END AS root_svc_genre FROM tb_svc_genre X ) e ON d.svc_genre_id = e.svc_genre_id JOIN ( SELECT b.character_no, b.prefer_genre_id, b.artist_id AS prefer_artist_id, CASE C.nation_cd WHEN 'KOR' THEN 1 ELSE 'FOR' END AS artist_nation FROM tb_character A JOIN tb_character_prefer_artist b ON a.character_no = b.character_no JOIN ted_artist c ON b.artist_id = c.artist_id WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} ) f ON d.prefer_genre_id = f.prefer_genre_id and e.root_svc_genre = f.artist_nation WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND d.svc_genre_cnt > 1 ) aa JOIN tb_chart bb ON aa.svc_genre_id = bb.svc_content_id JOIN tb_chart_music_content cc ON bb.chart_id = cc.chart_id JOIN tb_track dd ON cc.music_content_id = dd.track_id JOIN ted_track ee ON dd.track_id = ee.track_id JOIN ted_album ff ON ee.album_id = ff.album_id JOIN tb_album_img gg ON ff.album_id = gg.album_id WHERE bb.chart_type_cd IN ('DAILY', 'NEW') AND bb.svc_content_type = 'GENRE' AND bb.music_content_type = 'TRACK' AND cc.disp_sn = 1 ORDER BY aa.ord ASC, aa.update_dtime DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT a.chart_id, a.chart_nm, c.track_id, c.track_nm, b.disp_sn as trackSn, b.bf_disp_sn trackBfSn FROM tb_chart a JOIN tb_chart_music_content b ON a.chart_id = b.chart_id JOIN tb_track c ON b.music_content_id = c.track_id WHERE a.chart_id = #{chartId} AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY b.disp_sn
